name: Rockshield Capital Corp.
description: Rockshield Capital Corp. was a Canadian-based venture capital firm that focused on providing early-stage, seed, and emerging growth investments to companies with significant capital appreciation potential. The firm operated as an investment company, managing a portfolio of marketable securities and venture capital interests. Following a series of corporate developments, including a reverse merger, the entity transitioned its business focus, with the former Valdy Investments Ltd. (a capital pool company) eventually rebranding to The INX Digital Company, Inc., a technology firm specializing in regulated trading platforms for digital securities and cryptocurrencies.
